name: Blender Action: Export FBX
description: Creates a Blender action to export scene or selection as FBX using bpy.ops.export_scene.fbx. Supports frame range, bake animation, and leaf bones options.
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    fbx_path = inputs.get('fbx_path') or self.get_parameter('fbx_path', '')
    selection_only = inputs.get('selection_only')
    if selection_only is None:
        selection_only = self.get_parameter('selection_only', False)
    frame_start = inputs.get('frame_start')
    if frame_start is None:
        frame_start = self.get_parameter('frame_start', 1)
    frame_end = inputs.get('frame_end')
    if frame_end is None:
        frame_end = self.get_parameter('frame_end', 100)
    bake_anim = inputs.get('bake_anim')
    if bake_anim is None:
        bake_anim = self.get_parameter('bake_anim', True)
    add_leaf_bones = inputs.get('add_leaf_bones')
    if add_leaf_bones is None:
        add_leaf_bones = self.get_parameter('add_leaf_bones', False)
    action = {
        'type': 'export_fbx',
        'fbx_path': fbx_path,
        'selection_only': bool(selection_only),
        'frame_start': int(frame_start),
        'frame_end': int(frame_end),
        'bake_anim': bool(bake_anim),
        'add_leaf_bones': bool(add_leaf_bones)
    }
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added export_fbx action -> {fbx_path} (frames {frame_start}-{frame_end})')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
